name: Gjirafa Tek
description:
Company Description
Gjirafa Tek is a technology and digital solutions company focused on software development, cloud infrastructure, digital transformation, and enterprise technology services. The company delivers scalable web and mobile applications, system integrations, data-driven platforms, and IT consulting solutions for both private and public sector clients. With expertise in modern software engineering practices, cybersecurity, cloud technologies, and platform development, Gjirafa Tek supports organizations in improving operational efficiency, digital accessibility, and user experience through innovative technology solutions.
